---
name: Crypto review
about: Review Flowvault's hidden-volume format, key derivation, or encryption flow
title: "Crypto review: "
labels: crypto-review-wanted, security
---

## Area reviewed

- [ ] Hidden-volume slot format
- [ ] Argon2id / HKDF key schedule
- [ ] AES-256-GCM usage
- [ ] Encrypted Send
- [ ] Time-locked notes
- [ ] .fvault / .flowvault backup formats
- [ ] Other:

## Finding or question

Describe the concern, edge case, or invariant you reviewed.

## Reproduction / reasoning

If this is a bug, include the steps or code path. If this is a design
question, include the reasoning and threat model.

## Impact

What can an attacker learn or do if this concern is valid?

## Suggested fix

Optional, but appreciated.
